# OnCoGroupDataSet

###

Related Doc: [package acceptPartialFunctions](<package.html>)

[ ](<../../../../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.scala.extensions.impl.acceptPartialFunctions.OnCoGroupDataSet> "Permalink")

####  class OnCoGroupDataSet[L, R] extends AnyRef

Wraps a co-group data set, allowing to use anonymous partial functions to perform extraction of items in a tuple, case class instance or collection

L


The type of the left data set items

R


The type of the right data set items

Linear Supertypes

AnyRef, Any

  15. ####  def projecting[O](fun: (Stream[L], Stream[R]) ⇒ O)(implicit arg0: TypeInformation[O], arg1: ClassTag[O]): [DataSet](<../../../DataSet.html>)[O]

[ ](<../../../../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.scala.extensions.impl.acceptPartialFunctions.OnCoGroupDataSet@projecting\[O\]\(fun:\(Stream\[L\],Stream\[R\]\)=>O\)\(implicitevidence$1:org.apache.flink.api.common.typeinfo.TypeInformation\[O\],implicitevidence$2:scala.reflect.ClassTag\[O\]\):org.apache.flink.api.scala.DataSet\[O\]> "Permalink")

Co-groups the data sets using the function `fun` to project elements from both in the resulting data set

Co-groups the data sets using the function `fun` to project elements from both in the resulting data set

O


The return type of the projection, for which type information must be known

fun


The function that defines the projection of the co-group operation

returns


A fully co-grouped data set of Os
